# Zixi Wang

Zixi Wang is an M.Eng. student in Software Engineering at the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China.

Research interests include machine learning, gradual domain adaptation, robust visual perception, and software engineering.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://acad.wangzixi.top/
- Publications: https://acad.wangzixi.top/publications/
- CV: https://acad.wangzixi.top/cv/
- GitHub: https://github.com/dramwig
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=KL1uqx4AAAAJ
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0009-4979-4562
- OpenReview: https://openreview.net/profile?id=~Zixi_Wang2

## Selected Publications

- Self-Training with Dynamic Weighting for Robust Gradual Domain Adaptation. NeurIPS 2025. https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.13864
- Multi-Modal Gradual Domain Osmosis: Stepwise Dynamic Learning with Batch Matching for Gradual Domain Adaptation. ACM Multimedia 2025. https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3746027.3755817
- SWAT: Sliding Window Adversarial Training for Gradual Domain Adaptation. https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.19155
